Move through the target range of motion with control.
Pause briefly at the hardest point, then return.
form_cues: Exhale on effort and inhale on the return.
Keep a neutral neck and steady tempo.
common_mistakes: Cutting the range of motion short.

name: Bodyweight Triceps Rope Press
instructions: Set shoulders down and back before pressing.
Press smoothly while keeping wrists stacked.
Control the return to the start.
form_cues: Keep elbows at a comfortable angle.
Keep ribs down to avoid arching.

name: Supine Chest Throw
instructions: Start in an athletic stance with soft knees.
Explode through the floor and land softly.
Stick the landing with control before the next rep.
form_cues: Aim for short ground contact time.
Keep knees tracking over toes on landing.
